title: A Rational Inquiry
content: You take a seat without being invited. 'Sterling was a senior analyst. He understood logistics. I'm trying to understand why a man of your stature is so interested in the mechanics of the London underworld.'||Thorne turns slowly, a thin smile playing on his lips. 'Mr. Sterling was a man of patterns. But patterns can be misinterpreted by those who don't see the whole board. Vane was a victim of his own vivid imagination. He saw monsters where there are only business interests.'

choices.text: 'And "The Cleaners"? Are they part of your business interests?'
